cards.front: What is the main data structure used by pandas?
What is the primary function of the pandas Library?
What is a DataFrame in pandas?
cards.back: A 2-dimensional labeled data structure with columns of potentially different types

cards.front: How do you create a new DataFrame in pandas?
cards.back: Using the DataFrame constructor (df = pd.DataFrame()) or from a dictionary (df = pd.DataFrame(dict))

cards.front: What is the purpose of the 'head' and 'tail' functions in pandas?
cards.back: To display the first few rows (head) or the last few rows (tail) of a DataFrame
